mapper:
INSERT INTO delivery_order(order_no, user_id, merchant_id, rider_id, total_price, status, address, remark, is_urged, address_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, receiver_latitude, receiver_longitude, <<<<<<< HEAD product_amount, delivery_fee, discount_amount, actual_amount, pay_status) VALUES(#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{riderId}, #{totalPrice}, #{status}, #{address}, #{remark}, #{isUrged}, #{addressId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{receiverLatitude}, #{receiverLongitude}, #{productAmount}, #{deliveryFee}, #{discountAmount}, #{actualAmount}, #{payStatus}) ======= product_amount, delivery_fee, discount_amount, actual_amount, pay_status, tip_amount, required_rider_level, required_rider_title) VALUES(#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{riderId}, #{totalPrice}, #{status}, #{address}, #{remark}, #{isUrged}, #{addressId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{receiverLatitude}, #{receiverLongitude}, #{productAmount}, #{deliveryFee}, #{discountAmount}, #{actualAmount}, #{payStatus}, #{tipAmount}, #{requiredRiderLevel}, #{requiredRiderTitle}) >>>>>>> origin/feature-user-rider-merchant
INSERT INTO order_item(order_id, product_id, quantity, price, product_name, product_image, amount) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{productName}, #{imageUrl}, #{subtotalAmount})
SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.user_id AS userId, o.merchant_id AS merchantId, COALESCE(mi.store_name, mu.real_name, mu.username) AS merchantName, o.rider_id AS riderId, o.rider_name AS riderName, o.rider_phone AS riderPhone, o.total_price AS totalPrice, o.product_amount AS productAmount, o.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, o.discount_amount AS discountAmount, o.actual_amount AS actualAmount, COALESCE(o.actual_amount, o.total_price) AS payAmount, <<<<<<< HEAD ======= COALESCE(o.tip_amount, 0) AS tipAmount, COALESCE(o.required_rider_level, 0) AS requiredRiderLevel, COALESCE(o.required_rider_title, '普通') AS requiredRiderTitle, >>>>>>> origin/feature-user-rider-merchant o.status AS status, o.pay_status AS payStatus, o.order_time AS orderTime, o.merchant_confirm_time AS merchantConfirmTime, o.kitchen_finish_time AS kitchenFinishTime, o.estimated_arrival_time AS estimatedArrivalTime, o.finish_time AS finishTime, o.address AS address, o.receiver_name AS receiverName, o.receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, o.receiver_address AS receiverAddress, o.receiver_latitude AS receiverLatitude, o.receiver_longitude AS receiverLongitude, o.remark AS remark, o.is_urged AS isUrged, o.remind_count AS remindCount, o.last_remind_time AS lastRemindTime FROM delivery_order o LEFT JOIN sys_user mu ON o.merchant_id = mu.user_id LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON o.merchant_id = mi.merchant_id
WHERE o.user_id = #{userId}
AND FIND_IN_SET(o.status, #{status})
ORDER BY o.order_time DESC, o.order_id DESC
WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId} AND o.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT item_id AS itemId, order_id AS orderId, oi.product_id AS productId, COALESCE(product_name, p.name) AS productName, COALESCE(oi.product_image, p.image_url) AS imageUrl, quantity, oi.price AS price, COALESCE(amount, oi.price * quantity) AS subtotalAmount FROM order_item oi LEFT JOIN product p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY item_id ASC
UPDATE delivery_order SET status = -1, cancel_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, cancel_reason = #{reason} WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
UPDATE delivery_order SET is_urged = 1, remind_count = COALESCE(remind_count, 0) + 1, last_remind_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
<<<<<<< HEAD =======
UPDATE delivery_order SET tip_amount = COALESCE(tip_amount, 0) + #{tipAmount} WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND rider_id IS NOT NULL AND status IN (3, 4)
>>>>>>> origin/feature-user-rider-merchant
SELECT MAX(create_time) FROM order_reminder WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND user_id = #{userId}
INSERT INTO order_status_log(order_id, status, status_text, operator_type, operator_id, remark) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{status}, #{statusText}, #{operatorType}, #{operatorId}, #{remark})
SELECT log_id AS logId, order_id AS orderId, status, status_text AS statusText, operator_type AS operatorType, operator_id AS operatorId, remark, create_time AS createTime FROM order_status_log WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY create_time ASC, log_id ASC
INSERT INTO product_review(order_id, user_id, merchant_id, score, content) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{score}, #{content})
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM product_review WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND user_id = #{userId}
<<<<<<< HEAD SELECT COUNT(1) FROM delivery_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} ======= SELECT COUNT(1) FROM delivery_order WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status <> -1 >>>>>>> origin/feature-user-rider-merchant
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM product_review WHERE user_id = #{userId}
